feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: I need to add an additional us gaap ledger during a move ECC to a S/4HANA private cloud
entry.content:
Dear community members,

A customer of mine is about to move from its ECC system to a S/4HANA Private Cloud, and asked me if it is possible to add an US GaaP ledger in addition of its local ledger.

Anyone already faced this issue ?

Thanks for support 

BR

entry.title: additional reporting currency
entry.content:
Dear community members,

I need to add an additional reporting currency during a move ECC to S/4HANA (group currency). Anyone already came along this question ?

Many thanks support

BR

entry.title: Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX
entry.content:
Hi Experts

System: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

We are trying to trigger the SOAP API CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST for Sales Order Confirmation as an EDI output, this is an outbound scenario to send Sales order confirmation from SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud) to SAP Integration Suite which will further map the message and send to 3rd party system.

but encountering an issue where the service is not being called, we are getting this error in the output processing,

Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX

  • The Logical port has been created in SOAMANAGER
  • NACE configuration has been done to configure the respective program and form routine as per SAP documentation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/19d48293097f4a2589433856b034dfa5/cf829dd7c1ef4eb08eca4575c2e518ff.html

In Debugging via program RSNAST00:

The code is trying to determine provider applications (technical receiver) in the below code, which fails and this error is thrown, any idea how and where to maintain the provider application/technical receiver?

Any documentation link will be helpful.

 

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: Contract pricing for use in both Sales and Service
entry.content:
Hi all, Can a Service order or service quote also reference a sales contract? The background to my question is that we would have one contract with the customer with price agreements covering services and service parts. The same part could be sold in a straight-forward spare parts sales order without any connection to the service department, or it could be used in a service or repair order. In both case it needs to apply the same price agreement.

Can this be achieved through a single contract document, or would we need to create 2 documents: 1 sales contract, and 1 service contract with the same content for those parts that could be referenced by either?

Thank you

Patrick

entry.title: Difference between S/4HANA private cloud vs S/4HANA on-premise
entry.content:
As most people say, S/4HANA private cloud is almost similar to on-premise edition except that the private cloud solution is managed by SAP. What are the other major differences that we need to take into account for? (e.g., topics like security, how to expose custom oData service and how to authenticate, etc.)

With public cloud, when exposing a web API, we usually create the communication arrangements/scenario/system/users. Do we have the same functionality in S/4HANA private cloud edition?

Even though the S/4HANA private cloud is managed by SAP, is it still considered as "on-premise"? Where should the cloud connector software be installed?

entry.title: Financial Document (Letter of Credit) FTR_CREATE further processing in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise on the steps to be followed for Letter of Credit (L/c) Financial Document processing in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. 

we had created Financial document using t-code FTR_CREATE and assigned in Sales Order. However we could not further enable settings/configuration regarding Financial Document (L/c) validity check and value check in further subsequent process. 

Also please advise on how the below configuration is done in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: EBRR: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer project - Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales, has been delivered with S/4 Public Cloud 2408.

A French customer of mine has this requirement for the Private Cloud. I am not seeing this in the RoadMap explorer. Do you know if/when this functionality will be available in the Private Cloud?

Thank you,

Christine

entry.title: Standard Workflows in Production Planning and Quality Mangement in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Can help me with standard list of workflows available for Production Planning ( Process industry )  and Quality management ? If not available what are eaiset tools is available for it ?

entry.title: Hi! I'm looking for the Learning Journey for S/4HANA Private, Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for the Learning Journey for S/4HANA Private, Sourcing and Procurement:

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-s-4hana-sourcing-and-procurement

The link into the Cdertification is not valid, the url doesn´t exist!

 

Thank you all.

Carol.

entry.title: The Last Changed date on Purchase Order Items is not updated
entry.content:
Hello!

 

We would like to confirm one thing.

In our private cloud system, we have noticed that when a purchasing document status becomes "Fully Delivered" by the receipt of goods, the last changed date of the Purchase Order Items is not updated accordingly. Is this a standard behaviour that the date is not updated by the change of the status?

Thank you in advance,

Regards

Fujita

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Letter of credit processing
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

Could you please advise on the steps to be followed for Letter of credit processing through TRM module Trade Finance Integration with SD module. 

Our requirement is to link the Letter of Credit document in sales order and have the control in Delivery and Billing based on Letter of credit (L/c) value and validity.

Please advise 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Intercompany purchase for materials with account assignment or Lean services
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm in a greenfield implementation for S4Hana Cloud private.

In this project is required to implement an intercompany process starting in the purchase order but for materials with account assignment or Lean services (this is not possible in advanced intercompany).

For Cloud public edition this scenario exist: Scenario Billing of Costs Between Affiliated Companies (3ZB) but i can't find similar guide for Cloud private.

Can anyone share any implementation guide or documentation about this process?

entry.title: Account determination error for pricing element in a service order
entry.content:
Hello, experts,

We are configuring the service module for S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, and running tests with service orders using advanced execution (MSO1).

Due to process requirements, we need to add some price conditions in the service order, as shown below:

However, when we try to save the order, we encounter the following error:

This error occurs for each price condition. The sales organization mentioned in the error is actually the one we created during the configuration of the service organizational unit, and in the SPRO transaction, we have already assigned this sales organization for services to the respective sales organization in sales (SD):

Additionally, in transaction VKOA, the account determination has been set up for the sales organization of SD (1002). How can we configure the system so that the account determination considers the sales organization (SD) instead of the service organization?

I would greatly appreciate any assistance with this issue.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
David Avila.

entry.title: CDS Datasource for data extraction
entry.content:
Currently in S4 HANA, we use standard CDS data source for data extraction to SAP BW. We can create custom CDS data source using custom CDS app key user extension but that has limitations. How do we create custom CDS data source for extraction in SAP BW for achieving clean core using developer extension?

Currently, the annotation for CDS data extraction is not released for cloud. Are we supposed to create a service as a workaround and Is the annotation planned to be released for cloud in future versions? What is the workaround for this case?

entry.title: Output Management: Alternative to SMTP? (E-Mails)
entry.content:
Hi community,

We are exploring a scenario within our SAP system (S4 private cloud) where we need to send invoices as PDF documents to our business partners. To my knowledge, the standard SAP logic typically employs the SMTP protocol for such tasks. However, for our specific requirements, we are interested in utilizing an alternative protocol (most probably http). Our idea would be to reach to the integration suite via an alternative protocoll and there we could use the Microsoft Graph API.

Has anyone implemented such scenario for sending PDF invoices? If so, could you please share insights or guidance on the following points. Do we need custom logic or is there standard logic available?

I would appreciate any documentation, SAP notes, or personal experiences related to this topic.

Thank you in advance for your help and support!

Best Regards,

Dominic

entry.title: Re: Two-Tier ERP limitations
entry.content:
Hi,

Please find my comments below

  • SAP two-tier ERP can be highly beneficial for many industries, considering use cases that are address Acquisitions, Regional branches,Autonomous divisions, Divestitures,Incubators and joint ventures. To know more click on " What is two-tier ERP? " page on sap.com
  • If you are evaluating very specific Industry processes, you need to go through discovery phase. You can read more - S/4HANA Cloud Digital Discovery Assessment. Please register here. 
  • Again, each organization must carefully assess their unique needs, regulatory environment, business complexity, and available resources before deciding if a two-tier ERP approach makes sense. You may engage with an SAP account executive to evaluate different options, including cost benefits.
  • For detailed documentation, users can explore the given path in SAP for Me to understand the full range of SAP-delivered two-tier ERP capabilities  SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and visit accelerators > Implementation> Two-Tier ERP_End-to-End Business Processes for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 
  • You can also reach out two-tier ERP community for more specific clarifications

Regards, Shivakumar HS

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition, Sales 2023
entry.content:
Dear Members , Good Day!

Is there any free live practise sessions offered to prepare for S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition, Sales 2023 certification.

Appreciate any pointers.

Thank you!

entry.title: CDS for Picking Process in Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello, I successfully created an Outbound Delivery using I_OutboundDeliveryTP and EML with ABAP RAP. However, to Post GI for this delivery I couldn't find a way to update picking quantity for items in my outbound delivery. 

How can I do that in ABAP Cloud Private Edition? I attempted to modify the field PickQuantityInOrderUnit of the entity OutboundDeliveryItem, but I get an error that this field is read-only. Moreover, trying to create items of I_OutboundDeliveryTP using _Item association with PickQuantityInOrderUnit set resulted in the same error.

entry.title: QM Inspection Lot not generated for lot origin (14-Plant Maintenance) for Maintenance Schedule Plan
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we had created a maintenance plan and  we had scheduled this maintenance plan through PM module. For the maintenance plan, QM In-process Order type, Task List & Equipment is assigned to it.

We are using SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition.

However, Inspection Lot is not generated for Inspection Lot Origin (14 - Plant Maintenance)

Inspection Lot not generated in QA32

Could you please advise on how to trigger  QM-Inspection Lot based on Inspection Lot Origin : 14 (Plant Maintenance). 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas
